summary:
DIVINE DIRECTIVES AND POLITICAL PROPHECIES: Brandon states that God instructed him to revisit and pray over previously issued warnings rather than seeking new revelations. Brandon highlights a failed cryptocurrency bill in the Senate, attributing its failure to a lack of prayer. Brandon warns of impending attacks on American soil and against former President Trump. Brandon discusses Greenland, asserting that attempting to acquire it would cause a massive global rift and that Trump's decisions regarding this over the next two weeks will determine the outcome of the 2026 midterms. Brandon also claims that Trump is surrounded by ungodly counsel and spiritual moles, prompting prayers for divine enlightenment and the removal of untrustworthy cabinet members. Furthermore, Brandon predicts a future Watergate-style scandal if corrupt individuals are not prayed out of power, and he agrees with other prophecies describing JD Vance as two-faced.

GLOBAL CONFLICTS AND INTERNATIONAL LEADERSHIP: Brandon focuses on international affairs, particularly the political climate in Mexico, where he prays for the removal of Claudia Sheinbaum, describing her as a corrupt puppet influenced by cartels. Brandon envisions a new Mexican leader resembling Antonio Banderas who will bring economic prosperity. Brandon also targets Asian nations, praying against the spread of communism in Taiwan, South Korea, and Japan. Brandon calls for regime changes in China and North Korea, specifically praying for the removal of Xi Jinping and Kim Jong-un, predicting that internal political confusion in China will pave the way for a massive revival by the underground church. Additionally, Brandon foresees the destruction of a thousand-year-old Asian temple and prays for a financial and spiritual shift in Iran to break the hold of Babylon.

WEATHER WARFARE AND AGRICULTURAL PROTECTION: Brandon actively prays against severe weather events, specifically rebuking crippling ice storms and massive power outages across Texas and southern Oklahoma. Brandon calls for an end to droughts in the Texas Panhandle and Oklahoma, asking for beneficial rain and Gulf moisture to sustain wheat crops and fill lakes without causing destruction. Brandon explicitly condemns weather warfare, modification, and manipulation, mentioning HAARP, and prays that the equipment and chemicals used by those attempting to control the weather will fail.

END-TIMES DECEPTION AND ALIEN NARRATIVES: Brandon discusses the recent occurrences of massive solar flares and the Northern Lights reaching as far south as Oklahoma, interpreting them as heavenly signs. Brandon repeatedly warns of a coming great deception involving false alien invasions. Brandon asserts that these so-called aliens are actually demonic spirits designed to confuse the masses and provide a secular explanation for the biblical rapture. Brandon references news articles about the Bank of England preparing for a financial crisis sparked by alien life, using this as evidence that global institutions are already constructing an alibi for the sudden disappearance of Christians. Brandon also warns that Artificial Intelligence will be utilized to further blur the lines between reality and fabrication in these end-times deceptions.

IMPENDING THREATS AND SPIRITUAL WARFARE: Brandon warns of looming global chaos, citing a recent shooting in Florida and the presence of terrorists resembling ISIS as signs of localized domestic threats. Brandon explicitly points to the upcoming Olympics opening ceremony in France, describing a planned abomination and predicting dark assignments, including black swan events orchestrated by figures like Macron. Brandon also anticipates a major terrorist plot aimed at the Vatican. In response to these global shakings, he emphasizes the necessity of spiritual warfare. Brandon urges believers to contend for a prophesied wealth transfer, which Satan is actively resisting, and encourages the practice of speaking in tongues and utilizing spiritual authority to bring about financial provision, healing, and protection.
rawData: [January 20, 2026]-[Praying over the things the Lord has shown us]-[https://youtu.be/CBpKNYPCKgA]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining us again today. Well, I have some things on my heart. I want to say this right off the bat: everything we do on this channel, in word and in deed, we give all to the glory of God. Everything is to give God glory. It's not to draw attention to ourselves, but it's always to draw attention to him. He said, "I'm going to do some things different." And he said to me, "I want you to go back to every single video of the things that I've warned you to pray about, and I want you to take the time to pray for every single individual thing for a while." He said, "I've given you enough, son, for a while. There is a lot there that has never been prayed over." He said the crypto bill that got held back in the Senate failed because they didn't vote on it, and it should have been bathed in prayer and it wasn't. He said there are attacks coming upon your soil that have not been bathed in prayer. There are attacks against your president that have not been bathed in prayer. Great war is rice-paper-thin, ready to break out across the world, and it needs more prayer. He said there's much prayer that needs to be done. We need to pray for the plague. There's revival. There are so many things with the wave and the markets and all about what is happening financially in this global economic shaking. I told you all what the Lord said about Greenland and there was not a green light to take Greenland. Many people said, "Well Brandon, we should take Greenland." I said it will cause a great rift in Europe. It will cause a great rift around the world, and this is either a make-or-break time for President Trump's term. He said the decisions in the valley of decision where he's at right now will make or break the election in the 2026 midterms. This will be the deciding factor, the deciding things that he does over the next two weeks going into the first part of February. He said this will be, even with the State of the Union speech, what makes or breaks this nation: if he gets the Senate and the House and the decisions that he makes. He even warned me today in prayer. He said he has ungodly counsel counseling him and you need to pray these people away—that he would have a visitation, that the eyes of his understanding would be enlightened, and that he would know who he can trust, who he can't trust, and who he needs to eliminate out of his cabinet in his spiritual circle. I saw even moles in his spiritual circle and the Lord showed me, saying, "Brandon, this is very important that he takes no counsel from ungodly people." So I said, "Well, I will do what you asked me to do. This is your channel." I'm telling you, if he told me to turn it off tomorrow, I'd do whatever he asked me to do and I would sail away into the sunset. Ride away into the sunset. That's just the way I feel. I've done this strictly for him. So to the haters, to the believers, to all of it, I don't really care what side of the fence you're on. I give all the glory to God anyway. And if he says, "Brandon, I'm done using you on YouTube," guess what? My wife and I are satisfied with that. But he said, "Brandon, I want you to pray more. I want you to take authority because the church, the remnant, has power and authority to tread on serpents and scorpions, and nothing shall by any means hurt us" to the believing believer. Do you understand? Not begging believers, believing believers. People who understand who they are in Christ and that are willing to say, "Hey, thus far, Satan, and no further. You will not cause people to be shot like it happened today in Florida with the retired couple." You can see the article right here; Braden posted it for you. So, we see what the Lord showed us about chaos trying to happen in Orlando. We had a guy that looked like an ISIS terrorist. And so, that happened today. Then we had a massive solar flare—the largest one in 20 years—erupt, a super solar storm. The Lord said to watch for signs in the heavens. The weatherman said you're going to see Northern Lights clear down into Oklahoma again. This is an unusual happening that is occurring so back-to-back all the time now, because we saw them a couple of weeks ago and it was so bright everybody was taking pictures of it. He said this one's going to be even stronger; it has the potential to be even stronger than the last one. And the Lord said fearful sights you will see that will bring you to your knees. In my dreams and in my praying time, he said, "I told you to start watching for the false alien invasions." He said, "These are demonic spirits that will come to try to deceive the masses." And he warned us about this and he brought it up to me again. He said, "Brandon, I told you they were coming. This is going to be a great deception. They're going to try to show themselves to try to explain away the rapture of the church in the days ahead." We are so close to the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. And I know in the last video I brought up some things about crypto and there was so much about that when the Lord was talking about the vote that was supposed to take place. We didn't have the vote because the enemy came in. The Lord said this is Satan's wheelhouse. This is what he was talking about. What does it mean to contend? He said, "My believers are going to have to contend for what's theirs." It won't just happen. The remnant has to contend for the wealth transfer. "For this is Satan's wheelhouse, Brandon, and he will resist you and fight you as hard as he can." He will try to come against the wealth transfer the most because he knows this is the end of the end. And he knows that this will fuel the revival. So if we're not believing believers using our authority over it and calling that money in, calling those things that be not as though they were, speaking to the finances to come in the name of Jesus because we have power, and life and death is in the power of the tongue. And when you speak it out of your mouth, you can have whatsoever things you say. Mark 11:24. If you use those scriptures—the Bible says, "Whatsoever things you desire when you pray, believe that you receive them and you shall have them." He also said in his word that if you abide in me and my words remain in you, you shall ask what you will and it shall be done unto you. So the word of God has to be priority in your heart. And when I saw the video before last and the Lord showed me Braden took that poll, I'm telling you you must be filled with the Holy Ghost, speaking in tongues. My wife, Diana, got an email from somebody that had an audible voice reading this book "Why Tongues?" because I'm not a person who likes to read and it's hard sometimes to really comprehend what you're reading because there's so much there to meditate on. But I can hear it, and when I hear it and see it, I learn a lot better versus reading it because of what I've overcome. So she found this and I listened to it today and I told her we have to listen to it again and again. Why? Because faith comes by hearing, and hearing by the word of God. Why would you need to learn and do that? You already pray in tongues. Good. Because faith comes by hearing and hearing again. Even I don't know it all. And I'm going to tell you, I learned something from this today, too. So, even being as polished as some of you try to say we are—I don't see myself as that. I just see myself as Brandon. And I'm telling you all, I don't ever put myself on that pedestal that some of you try to. But I'm going to tell you this: God is good. And I'm excited about this book. There's a video on YouTube with this being read, and it's a blessing. So, I would encourage you, if you want to just listen to it in your car or on your headphones or whatever, you can find it. There was a Derek Prince video he sent. The Derek Prince video was about speaking in tongues and teaching the baptism of the Holy Spirit. Phenomenal. And at the end of it, he leads you in the prayer of faith to receive the baptism of the Holy Spirit. It's called 'Receive the Holy Spirit' by Derek Prince. And I'm telling you, it's phenomenal. Really, the first 30 minutes of the video is pretty slow, but when he gets to the last half and leads the people in the prayer, it is really amazing. I loved it. And so, I'm going to listen to that again and again. It's so good to polish yourself and to keep going. We don't know it all. And anybody who says they do is highly mistaken and full of pride. I'm going to tell you, watch out for people who think they know it all. Brandon Biggs is a work in progress and so is Diana. So is Braden. We're all works in progress. We're so thankful that God has had patience with us even in our shortcomings. And I'm so thankful that you give me a chance every single day to come into your house and teach the Word of God to you and tell you that Jesus Christ is coming. Thank you for praying with us today. So, we're going to pray. We're going to lift up these things. Now, I was sent prophecies from other people saying things about JD Vance. There's a prophetess that gave a word and she said that there were things that she saw concerning JD Vance, that he was two-faced and all these other things. That is exactly what I try to tell you all. It lines up with what I've seen. So, all glory to God. We didn't listen to it though. I did not listen to it, but Diana was reading part of the transcript. Someone emailed it to me. Somebody emailed Diana what was being said. So I want to say I believe what this prophet is saying. I believe that's a right-on word, that he's two-faced and big-headed. The Lord is warning about this. And I'm not here to pick on people and judge their character. But I'm also here to pray away the people that are not supposed to be in power that have been put in by people that are not right. And I believe that God will remove what he needs to remove and raise up the right voice for the hour of 2028. I said there will be a Watergate scandal come up in the days ahead if we do not pray these things away. So there are major things the Lord has told us even concerning war and an escalation of war concerning Greenland and all those things. And again, this last video the Lord showed us the Hispanic man rising up out of Claudia's position. Claudia would be moved in eventually in the days ahead. He said, 'But you will have to contend for it, Mexico. You will have to pray, for they will try to put another corrupt puppet inside the Mexican government to rule over Mexico.' Do you understand? It's run by big mafia cartel drug lords. And that's what the Lord was showing me. He said this has been a stronghold for a while. Just because we have a president now bringing light to it, this has been a problem for some time. So, we see what the Lord has shown us about Venezuela. We see all these things. So, that's what we're going to do. We're going to pray about it. All right, let's take communion right now and we'll pray. We're just going to jump right into this. I'll give you a little recap, but I want this video to focus on praying for what we have seen in the past, what God has revealed to us. And I truly believe it will show to be accurate with all my heart—what he has shown us about the tariffs. That's tomorrow, which is the 20th. It's probably already decided by now. But we pray over these judges. We pray over Trump and the decisions he'll make concerning Greenland. The Olympics start on the 6th of February, which is in two weeks. We've got major decisions concerning the crypto bill that needs to be pushed through and terrorist attacks—a Red Dawn experience. I don't even really know, other than by the Holy Ghost, what direction or what the hot spot is. He specifically said to me, 'I want you to take the time to pray over the things that I've already shown you instead of for me to give you anything new. Pray over what I've given you, son. It's very important.' It's being left in the back field; nobody's there, and it just gets forgotten. These are serious times. We are in a time that the church needs to rise up and have a backbone like a crowbar or we're going to lose the land. Do you understand? It's not just for me to come out here and show you something and then you just say, 'Well, we'll see if that happens.' Shame on you. There's a lot of you doing that. And so we're going to just pray. Father, I thank you for the body that was broken for us. We're so grateful for all that you've provided. We're so grateful for your son. Father, you became so real to us when you died on that cross and rose again on the third day. When we accepted you as Lord and Savior, we became wall-to-wall Holy Ghost. We're wall-to-wall Holy Spirit. You dwell on the inside of us, that as he is, so are we in this world. And we don't have to wallow around in a pig pen anymore. We are joint heirs of Jesus Christ, seed with him in the heavenlies, far above all principalities and powers, that we're no longer kids that are broken, busted, and disgusted. Father, as he is, so are we in this world. And Father, you provided healing, wholeness, and wellness. You provided the whole man. Just like Oral Roberts University is talking about the whole man—spirit, soul, and body. We don't just focus on the spirit or the body, but we focus on the mind, will, and emotions. Spirit, soul, and body. We focus on the whole man. And Father, that's even taking care of our flesh, eating right things that you show me. And Father, you said, 'Beloved, I wish above all things that you prosper and be in health even as your soul prospers.' We're so grateful for all that you've done and all that you continue to do. And Lord, we give you all the glory, honor, and praise for this prayer time today. Help us, Holy Spirit. Help us to be effective, that we hit the target of what's on your heart today. That we pray in the spirit in a brand new tongue. We lift up holy hands before you, and we give you all the glory, honor, and praise in Jesus' name. We lift up this body and we go, 'God, you're good and your mercy endures forever.' You're a healer. You're a deliverer in all of it in Jesus' name. Right, Lord. We take the blood and we apply the blood over us and we make much of the blood. And Father, whatever it takes to get the job done, Father, you've put the closers in and we're closers here today. We're here to lift up the holy name of Jesus. And we give you all the glory, honor, and praise, Father, for all you did with your blood. You are the sacrifice that took all our sins. You took all of it and you became sin for us. You became sickness. You became all that we needed. And Father, I thank you. You took all of it. And we make much of the blood, Father, and the blood makes much of us. And we dedicate this time of prayer to you, all to the glory of God. And we thank you, Father, for the blood that washes us and makes us whole in Jesus' name. What can wash away my sin? Nothing but the blood of Jesus. What can make me whole again? Nothing but the blood of Jesus. Oh, precious is the flow that makes me white as snow. No other fount I know, nothing but the blood of Jesus. Thank you for the blood. Thank you, Lord. Lord, you're so good to us. Now, God, we lift up all these needs and all these things that we've been praying over this last year. There are so many things, Lord, to pray over here. But we'll just start out by lifting up our president before you. So grateful, Father, for President Trump. I know he has a lot on him. And he has all in dealing with his own flesh, his own marriage, his own children, his own pride, his own needs—whatever he has in there—plus the demonic pressure. I can't even imagine the demonic pressure that's tried to knock him off his course. So, Father, we just lift him up before you. We thank you, Father, that you keep him, and you said you would give him perfect peace whose mind is stayed on thee because we trust in you, Lord. And we believe, Father, that you've appointed people. You put in kings and you take out kings. You put in presidents; you take presidents out. Father, I know that you told me, 'I've called him and chosen him for such a time as this.' And we don't exalt the man; we exalt you. And we just thank you, Lord, that you have your hand on the heart of the leader. The heart of the king is in the hand of the Lord. And we believe, Father, that today Trump's not a king; Trump's just a president. But God, I believe that the people—we voted and we believe for a good leader over this nation. And you said, 'Pray for our leaders.' We lift up our leaders before you right now. And we expose and uncover by faith in the name of Jesus every dark agenda concerning this nation. Every dark agenda concerning this nation, and we bind you and we command you to cease and desist in your maneuvering. And Father, I thank you, Lord, that Trump will be filled with and controlled by the Holy Ghost. That, Father, he would find you. Father, I thank you, Lord, that he would seek you and find you, and the door will be open. That you would speak to him, Lord, and a stranger's voice he'll not follow. The Bible says to take no counsel from the ungodly. So, Father, I thank you, Lord, that he has great discernment in the name of Jesus concerning leading this nation. I call his eyes to flood with light right now according to Ephesians 1, that the eyes of his understanding would be enlightened. Lord, we plead the blood of Jesus all around him, all around his thinking, all around his cabinet. I call, Father, for supernatural leadership to rise up all around him, that the hand of the Lord would guide him concerning Iran, concerning Greenland, concerning Venezuela, Mexico, and Cuba, and the enemy within. Father, exposing the corruption and finances all throughout Minnesota and Pennsylvania and Ohio and all of Nevada and California. Could be Florida since I said that. Father, I thank you, Lord, that you're exposing the darkness just like you did in Minnesota, that you're bringing opening and tearing off that curtain—that big guilt of all the corruption—and you're exposing it, and Ilhan Omar is being removed in the name of Jesus. We call her position filled with a godly person. We call for her position to be removed right now. Removed and deported back to where she came from. I call it in the name of Jesus done now for all the corruption in the mayor, the governor, the corruption in the lower levels; we call an exposing and expelling of all the corruption in Jesus' name all throughout Minnesota, all throughout California, all throughout Pennsylvania and Boston and all these areas, Father, in New York, that God would reign over these areas. And Father, the seedtime and harvest—the seeds of the wicked would reap the harvest now in Jesus' name. I thank you, Lord, for all our ICE agents. They're protected, Father, that they would find all the illegal terrorists, the people that would try to cause harm, the enemy within—the Red Dawn experience. I know there are some of those people, Father, they're just coming over here trying to find work and try to provide for their families. But that's not all of them. A lot of them are here to try to kill, steal, and destroy. And so, Father, the MS-13 and the drug lords and all the people that come over here illegally to kill, steal, and destroy, Father, we call them exposed and expelled in the name of Jesus. Father, that the angels of the Lord would help camp around and about our agents to go and get them and cause them to come out of here. Father, that we will not have mass terrorist attacks over our nation in the name of Jesus. We pray over our churches right now in Jesus' name. Over every church that's represented here, Father, from Lakewood to Cornerstone to Elevation to all of them. Father, there are so many people, so many churches. We lift them up before you. The River Church in Tampa, over every church. We call forth protection, that the angels of the Lord are camping around and about every single congregation in the name of Jesus. We say, Satan, you will not touch our pastors. We call shaking in our churches. We call humbling in our churches. And we thank you, Lord, that you said you would shake us to awake us, to bring the bride to your side. And God, I call for that shaking to awaken, to bring the bride by your side. And Father, we call forth a major harvest of souls from sea to shining sea, all around the Gulf to Canada and over Canada to sea to shining sea. We call a major revival in Jesus' name over these areas. Father, we call in the harvest of souls. We call in protection. We call in, Father, that we will do it uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. Blessed in the city, blessed in the field, blessed coming in, and blessed going out. Father, I thank you, Lord, that you're bringing forth that godly leader over Mexico. Father, I thank you, Lord, that Claudia Sheinbaum would be removed in the mighty name of Jesus. We call Claudia Sheinbaum to lose her seat of power. We call a new president in over Mexico, Father, to be that man that you showed me that looks like Antonio Banderas. Father, I call that new leader to rise up and lead that nation out of poverty, bringing in economic growth, economic blessing over the Hispanic Mexican culture people. We call it in right now in the name of Jesus that this will be a time of great acceleration of wealth transfer for the Spanish community. Father, they work hard and we thank you, Lord, that you bless their work and the efforts of their hands. I thank you, Father, you give them creative ideas to get wealth. Now, Father, over the crypto community and what's going on with this digital new industrial revolution and all the things that you've showed me over the boomer, the Sooners concerning South Korea and Japan. Father, I call a stirring in those governments right now in the name of Jesus that it will not go communist. It will not go to the dragon, but they'll stand like a backbone, like a crowbar, and they'll rise up in Taiwan. They'll rise up in South Korea and they will pray over their land and they will not go communist. They will not come underneath the iron curtain. We call a stirring in those countries. We call a stirring in the church in those countries that they would wake up and see that the Lord is good, and they'll remember what they used to do before. The elders, they'll not go back to communistic ways. They'll rise up in the name of Jesus and say, "We will have a nation that's underneath God." We call revival over South Korea and over Japan and over all the areas of Asia. We call a revival in the name of Jesus to rise up and proclaim that Jesus Christ is Lord of lords and King of Kings, and he's coming sooner than what we think. He's standing at the door ready to receive his bride. I call a financial breakthrough for every single person that's represented here today. We speak in the name of Jesus that we're blessed in the city. We're blessed in the field. We're blessed coming in and we're blessed going out. We call those things that be not as though they were. And I call my bank account filled up in the name of Jesus. I call their bank account filled up in the name of Jesus with supernatural witty ideas and creative ideas to get wealth. Everything we put our hands to would prosper and we will lack no good thing. We'll have more than enough to give to the kingdom of God and promote the gospel of Jesus Christ throughout this whole world and then the end will come. We believe, Father, that you called us and you have chosen us for such a time as this. We're that salt and we've not lost our saltiness. We will not get weary in well-doing. We'll rise up on the wings of eagles and we will take back and take our dominion authority over this earth because it's God-given. He said you have dominion and authority over all of Satan's works. And I believe, Father, that you've called us and you've chosen us to be that ecclesia, that church that rises up and says enough is enough. Father, I thank you, Lord, for the Olympics. It's always fun to watch, but God, I know the terrorists have a plot and a plan to go against it, to hurt the people that are attending. And then the opening ceremony, there's something dark there that you've told me that is an abomination to you. I say in the name of Jesus, it will not happen. You said, "Watch the Olympics." What is it? The sixth opening ceremony around it, the third, there's something. Father, I thank you Lord right now in the name of Jesus that every hidden plan, every hidden assignment from Macron, from black swan events—I saw him going down the river in France with the black swan event. We call that exposed in Jesus' name. I saw a major terrorist attack coming to the Vatican. And I say in the name of Jesus, a major event will not take place even at the Vatican. We've seen earthquakes in diverse places outside of Oregon, even in Italy. We've seen earthquakes taking place in Japan, the Ring of Fire. And I thank you, Father. Some of these things you said we could not stop. But I ask you, Father, that a thousand should fall at our side and 10,000 at our right hand, it will not come nigh us. That every believer that is represented here today, we cover them with the blood of Jesus and that there will be no calamity, no act of violence, nothing will come nigh them in Jesus' name. No virus of any kind. Father, you said in your word, we stand on that scripture Psalm 91. You said a thousand should fall at your side and 10,000 at your right hand, but it will not come nigh us. We believe God. We believe there's revival taking place. And Father, there will be a shaking with crypto. There's going to be a shaking with this new industrial revolution. Father, there'll be a shaking in finances. There'll be a shaking in politics. There'll be a shaking in the earth. There'll be a shaking in political things. There'll be a shaking in the church. I thank you that you shake us to awake us, oh God. Shake us to awake us. No more slumber. No more sleep. Wake up, church. Wake up, church. You're running out of time. We're running out of time. Father, I thank you, Lord. You've been so good to us already. And God, a lot of people have turned their back on you. They've had hearts of pride. They've had hearts of being full of themselves or they've been focused on what they shouldn't be focused on and they've lost focus of Jesus. Father, bring us back to your side. Father, with a higher praise, a higher glory for you, Jesus. Oh Lord, you've been so good to us. And you've had mercy when we didn't deserve mercy. We've had favor when we didn't deserve favor. Every one of us deserved hell and you pulled us right out of hell because we accepted you by your grace. Father, I thank you, Lord, for your grace. By grace, you are saved through faith. And we're so thankful that you said 1 Corinthians 5:5 was going to be the anthem of 2026 and it would go clear into 2027 and 2028. And you said, "I was going to shake the nations." You said, "I'm going to shake the nations for three years." There'll be great shakings to awaken. And God, I thank you, Lord. But my remnant will be held in the cleft of the rock. And I will protect you as it passes by. And I saw that death angel. I saw the shakings. I saw all of it coming. And you said, "I will protect my bride. I will protect the ones that are awake, Brandon. And I will hide you in the cleft of the rock." I thank you, Father. I thank you, Lord, that you said seed time and harvest will accelerate. Seed time and harvest is going to accelerate. And the sowers and the reapers will go hand in hand. And it will be on the just and the unjust. You said, "Brandon, I'll let it be on the just and the unjust. You're going to see an acceleration and great corruption will be uncovered and you'll see acceleration of blessing on my church. Goodness and mercy will follow you and you will see that goodness of uncommon wealth, uncommon favor, uncommon success, it's unprecedented. It's like it's going to be something that you know whenever it happens you'll be quick and give God all the glory." We're quick to give all the glory. Oh Father, we know it is you. No matter where we are in life, we know it is you in an unusual way. Favor and blessing in unusual ways are coming to the body. Unusual, when you entertain angels unaware. So, Father, I thank you, Lord, that we will know and we'll be so quick to acknowledge when we're in that place of an angel's presence. We say, "It's not that we're giving any praise to an angel, but we really need to shake his hand. Hey, how are you doing? It's good to meet you." Father, I thank you, Lord, regarding the false alien invasions. We thank you, Lord, that the people would have great discernment. And the more they talk about these aliens and all this stuff, we know it's just fallen demonic spirits. It's satanic. There's no such thing as aliens. People need to know that it's just demonic spirits sent to be a distraction to bring glory to themselves, to cause confusion. AI will be used for the exact same things. You'll not know the difference between real and fake, authentic and fake. It's coming. You'll have to question and see; there's so much deception coming.
